body.purpose: Paragraph text, conversation messages, UI copy.

heading.purpose: Page titles, section headers, card titles.

shadows.name: subtle-lift
shadows.purpose: Elevated surfaces only — popovers, dropdowns, toasts.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, and small state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.205 0.01 260); color: oklch(0.985 0.001 260); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.68 0.16 260 / 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action with transparent background and border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0.005 260); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0.006 260); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0.004 260); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.68 0.16 260 / 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Soft secondary action with muted background.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: oklch(0.97 0.005 260); color: oklch(0.205 0.01 260); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: none; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { opacity: 0.8; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Minimal button for navigation and tertiary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0.005 260); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: none; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0.004 260); }

components.name: Text Input
components.html: <input type="text" class="ds-input" placeholder="Enter your story title..." />
components.css: .ds-input { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0.005 260); padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; height: 32px; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0.006 260); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.556 0.01 260); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.68 0.16 260); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.68 0.16 260 / 0.5); }

components.name: Card Container
components.description: Content container with subtle ring border.
components.html:
Story Settings

Configure your narrative preferences

Card content goes here
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(1 0.005 260); color: oklch(0.145 0.005 260); padding: 1rem; border-radius: 0.875rem; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Quicksand, Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; margin: 0; } .ds-card-description { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.556 0.01 260); margin: 0; } .ds-card-content { font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; }

narrative.overview: A minimal, focused interface that puts story content and conversation front and center. The design is intentionally restrained with subtle purple-tinted neutrals and a single saturated accent color for moments of personality. The interface feels calm and trustworthy, with just enough playful detail to avoid feeling sterile.
keyCharacteristics: Tinted neutral palette with a single purple/violet brand hue (260°)
Dual-theme support (light and dark) with seamless system preference adaptation
Subtle rounded corners with consistent scale
Generous whitespace that lets content breathe
Purposeful motion — state feedback only, no decorative animation
Clean typographic hierarchy with distinct voice for headings

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The vibrant violet accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point — it draws attention only to what matters.

rules.name: The Tint Continuity Rule
rules.body: Every neutral color carries the same brand hue (260°). No grays, no off-blacks — every surface has a subtle violet undertone that ties the system together.

rules.name: The Dark Mode Symmetry Rule
rules.body: Dark mode is not an afterthought. Every color token has a direct dark-mode counterpart that maintains the same relative contrast and feeling. Switching modes should feel like turning down the lights, not entering a different app.

rules.name: The Readability First Rule
rules.body: Conversation text is the product. Body text must maintain comfortable line length (≤65ch), adequate line height (1.5), and AA+ contrast in both modes. Never sacrifice reading comfort for aesthetic effect.

rules.name: The No-Shadow-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Buttons, cards, inputs, and all primary UI elements have no drop shadow in their default state. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, focus, elevation), and even then, they are subtle.

dos: Do tint every neutral toward the brand hue (260°). No pure grays anywhere.
Do use the vibrant violet accent sparingly — ≤10% of any screen.
Do maintain full light/dark mode parity for every token and component.
Do prefer rings over shadows for surface definition.
Do use Quicksand for headings, Geist for body text — the contrast is intentional.
Do cap conversation text line length at ~65ch for readability.
Do animate only state changes — hover, focus, transitions between views.
donts: Don't use gradient text. Decorative, never meaningful.
Don't use glassmorphism effects. Blurred backgrounds add visual noise without value.
Don't add shadows to buttons or cards at rest. Keep surfaces flat and clean.
Don't introduce new colors outside the palette. The system works because it's constrained.
Don't use heavy border-radius on interactive elements. The lg scale for buttons, xl for cards is the maximum.
Don't add decorative animations that don't communicate state. If it doesn't tell the user something, remove it.
Don't create SaaS landing-page clichés: hero metrics, feature grids with icons, generic testimonials.
